title: Example RNA-Seq Data
author: Daniel Sobral
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This is an RNA-Seq small example dataset by transforming data originally from Guilgur et al. (2012). It consists of data corresponding to a small selection of Drosophila melanogaster genes. This dataset includes sequencing reads as well as gene annotation.
steps_raw: This is an RNA-Seq small example dataset by transforming data originally from Guilgur et al. (2012). It consists of data corresponding to a small selection of Drosophila melanogaster genes. This dataset includes sequencing reads as well as gene annotation.
